home.title: Earn free points every hour
home.subtitle: Play the faucet, multiply in HI-LO and withdraw in BOLIS from Solana.
home.btc_pred_desc: Will Bitcoin go up or down in the next hour? Win by multiplying your points with dynamic odds.
home.sol_pred_desc: Forecast the price of Solana. Take advantage of volatility to increase your freeboli balance.
home.bolis_pred_desc: The house asset. Predict the BOLIS/SOL movement and withdraw your earnings directly.
home.faucet_desc: Claim points every hour without investing. Accumulate and convert to Solana BOLIS securely.
home.hilo_desc: Bet points and multiply. Provably Fair system to guarantee total transparency in every play.
home.aff_desc: Invite friends and earn lifetime commission (5%+) on all their claims and plays on the platform.
home.footer_desc: Add points by sending BOLIS to our wallet. When you have enough points, withdraw BOLIS to your Solana wallet (Phantom, etc.).
home.ranks_system_desc: Each rank gives you higher limits and point prizes
home.hero_badge: FreeBoli — Win, Play, Withdraw in Solana

hilo_verify.title: HI-LO roll verifier
hilo_verify.intro: Enter the roll data (or use the VERIFY link from history) to check the number was fairly derived: the server committed to the seed hash before the roll, and the number is computed with the same formula here in your browser.
hilo_verify.hash_bad: Server seed hash does NOT match.

faucet.title: Faucet
faucet.verify_email_alert: Verify your email address to claim
faucet.verify_email_desc: Check your inbox (and spam). If you haven't received it, go to your account to resend verification.
faucet.engagement_alert: Play at least 1 HI-LO game to keep claiming
faucet.engagement_desc: Every {0} claims, game activity is required (last 24h).
faucet.streaks_desc: Claim without interruptions to earn more points.
faucet.formula_desc: Formula: base x hourly multiplier x (1 + daily bonus). Example: 9h streak + day 15 = 100 x 3.0 x 1.75 = 525 pts
faucet.support_hint: Problems with the faucet? Report error or dispute here
faucet.error_engagement: Play at least 1 HI-LO game to keep claiming.
faucet.login_hint: Login or register to use the faucet.

hilo.title: HI-LO Multiplier
hilo.banner_title: Multiply your points with the HI-LO game (odds 1.01 to 4900).
hilo.banner_desc: Choose amount, bet HIGHER (Hi) or LOWER (Lo). Range 0000-9999. Win chance and cutoffs depend on odds (odds × % ≈ 98).
hilo.banner_limits: Max bet: {0} pts | Max win/play: {1} pts
hilo.odds_hint: Odds × win chance (%) ≈ 98 (theoretical RTP). Changing one recalculates the other.
hilo.rule_1: HI: you win if the number is ≥ {0}
hilo.rule_2: LO: you win if the number is ≤ {0}
hilo.rule_3: From {0} to {1} (inclusive): house wins (neither HI nor LO)
hilo.rule_3_adjacent: HI and LO ranges are adjacent (no separate house-only band).
hilo.rule_4: Odds {0}x · approx. win chance {1}% · theoretical RTP 98%
hilo.rules_pf_hint: Verifiable rolls (provably fair): use the VER link in history.
hilo.strategy_next_overrides_alternate: If you set Next bet (HI/LO/contrary), it overrides Alternate mode on the following roll.
hilo.history_empty: No rolls yet. Play to see your history (saved in database).
hilo.error_bet_manual: Enter a valid bet and press BET HI or BET LO.
hilo.support_hint: Problems with the multiplier? Report error or dispute here

predictions.title: Predictions
predictions.subtitle: Forecast {0} in {1} mode.
predictions.bet_limit_hint: MAX LIMIT: 10,000 POINTS -- 5% Commission (included in odds)
predictions.market_locked_admin: MINI BOLIS market temporarily locked by administration.
predictions.market_locked_time: Market Closed: {0} min before round end.
predictions.market_locked_micro: Bets Locked. Oracle Analyzing Final Result...
predictions.oracle_decline: The Oracle declined the operation: Number {0} is locked in this millisecond.
predictions.support_hint: Problems with prediction? Report error or dispute here
predictions.error_api: Could not load the round. Try again.
predictions.desc_hourly: The classic mode: You have 50 minutes to bet on whether the price will go up or down at the end of the hour. The last 10-minute window is locked for closing.
predictions.desc_mini: Fast action: 10-minute rounds. You have 8 minutes to predict the movement. Odds are dynamic and change according to the market every second.
predictions.desc_micro: Digit Match: Guess the last digit of the price in 2 minutes. Win up to x9 covering 50% of the board with up to 5 bets. Speed and precision!
predictions.oracle_same_digit: The oracle does not accept betting on the same digit as the active price.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.nature_text: FreeBoli is an entertainment platform based on virtual points. Points have no intrinsic monetary value. BOLIS (SPL token on Solana) can be deposited and withdrawn according to current equivalence ({0} points = 1 BOLIS). The user accepts that they play at their own risk.
terms.limit_max_bet: Maximum bet per play: {0} points ({1} BOLIS)
terms.limit_max_win: Maximum win per play: {0} points ({1} BOLIS)
terms.limit_max_daily: Maximum daily win: {0} points ({1} BOLIS)
terms.limit_adjust_hint: Limits can be adjusted by administration at any time
terms.fair_text: The HI-LO game uses a verifiable provably fair system. Each roll generates a server_seed, client_seed, and nonce that the user can verify independently. Theoretical house edge ~2%: odds × win chance (%) ≈ 98; winning ranges depend on the odds.
conduct_list: Use of bots, automated scripts, emulators, or third-party software to manipulate or automate the game.
Creation of multiple accounts (multi-accounting) by the same person to evade limits, farm, or abuse bonuses.
Exploitation of errors, bugs, latencies, or system vulnerabilities to gain an unfair advantage.
Attempts at unauthorized access, denial-of-service attacks, or reverse engineering of the platform.
Points washing, suspicious transfers between accounts, or collusion between players.
Use of VPNs, proxies, or Tor networks to hide real location or evade IP restrictions.
Providing false or misleading information during registration or verification.
Any activity that the administration, in its sole discretion, deems fraudulent, abusive, or harmful.
terms.sanctions_text: Administration reserves the absolute right to suspend, restrict, or permanently delete any account without prior notice and without cause. This includes, but is not limited to, violations of prohibited conduct. In the event of a block, the user irrevocably loses access to points, bonuses, and the ability to withdraw BOLIS.
transac_list: Deposits are processed automatically upon verifying the transaction on Solana
Withdrawals are subject to review and may take up to 24 hours
A minimum withdrawal amount applies, configurable by administration
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Send ONLY BOLIS (SPL Token). If you send native SOL or other tokens, points will NOT be credited automatically and you might lose access to those funds.
Official BOLIS Solana Contract: 612nt4...5ha (verify on Solscan).
Exchange (DEX): You can swap SOL or USDT for BOLIS on Dexscreener (Decentralized platform).
We are not responsible for incorrect wallet use or erroneous transactions by the user.
The platform is not responsible for transactions sent to incorrect addresses
In case of technical error, administration can reverse operations
terms.faucet_text: The faucet and reward systems are optional benefits offered at platform's discretion. Amounts, frequencies, and conditions can change without prior notice. Systematic abuse of the faucet (farming with bots, multiple accounts) will result in immediate suspension.
terms.aff_text: Affiliate commissions are calculated automatically. The platform reserves the right to revoke commissions obtained through fraudulent referrals or self-referrals. Verified referral bonuses require the referral to meet minimum activity requirements.
terms.resp_text: FreeBoli does not guarantee uninterrupted service availability. We are not responsible for losses caused by technical, network, or Solana blockchain failures. The user accepts that they play with funds they can afford to lose.
terms.mods_text: To serve as a guide for users, These terms and conditions may be modified at any time. Continued use of the platform after a modification implies acceptance of the new terms. Users will be notified of significant changes.
terms.age_text: The user declares to be over 18 years old (or the legal age in their jurisdiction) and assumes responsibility for verifying that the use of this platform is legal in their country of residence.
terms.juris_text: The use of FreeBoli is strictly prohibited in jurisdictions where online gaming or the use of crypto assets is forbidden by law. It is the user's sole responsibility to verify the legality of the service in their country of residence.
terms.liability_text: The user accepts that FreeBoli is a platform for purely recreational use. It is explicitly warned that participation in games (HI-LO, Predictions, etc.) carries the risk of partial or total loss of accumulated points. By playing, the user assumes this risk of loss without the right to any claim.
terms.protection_text: By using this service, the user expressly waives the right to initiate any civil, judicial, criminal, or administrative action against the developers, administrators, or owners of FreeBoli for losses, technical errors, or any other management of the platform. The service is provided 'AS IS'.
terms.accept_confirm: By clicking "Accept", you confirm that you have read and accept all terms and conditions.
terms.status_accepted: Terms correctly accepted. You can now play.

help.title: Beginner's Guide
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FreeBoli
help.section1_text: BOLIS is the official community token on the Solana network. Solana is an ultra-fast blockchain with nearly non-existent fees, allowing your withdrawals and deposits to arrive in seconds.
help.section2_title: 💎 How do I earn free BOLIS?
help.section2_text: At FreeBoli you can accumulate BOLIS fractions in the form of Points:
help.section2_faucet: 🚰 Faucet: Claim free points every hour.
help.section2_ranking: 🏆 Ranking: Daily prizes for the most active players.
help.section2_games: 📈 Games: Multiply your points in HI-LO and Predictions.
help.section2_rewards: 🎁 Rewards: Complete missions to earn extra bonuses.
help.section3_text: You can withdraw your BOLIS when you reach a minimum of {0} points ({1} BOLIS). You will need a Solana wallet like Phantom or Solflare.
help.section4_text: If you want to play with larger amounts, you can deposit BOLIS from your personal wallet. Points will be automatically credited after 1 network confirmation.

deposit.title: Deposit BOLIS
deposit.desc: You have an exclusive address for your deposits. Send BOLIS (Solana token) to this address from Phantom or any wallet; points will be credited automatically. No memo or signature verification required.
deposit.warning: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Send ONLY BOLIS (SPL Token). If you send native SOL or other tokens, points will NOT be credited automatically and you might lose access to those funds.
deposit.swap_link: Need BOLIS? Swap SOL for BOLIS on Dexscreener.
deposit.min_deposit_hint: To be able to withdraw, deposit at least {0} BOLIS (equivalent to {1} points).
deposit.address_label: Your deposit address (scan the QR or copy the address):
deposit.error_load_address: Could not load your address. Check if DEPOSIT_WALLET_ENCRYPTION_KEY is configured on the server.
deposit.success_process: Success! Your deposit was detected and points were credited.
deposit.no_deposit_found: Your transfer is not yet detected on the network. Wait a few minutes and try again.
deposit.support_hint: Problems with your deposit? Report issue here
deposit.verify_info_desc: Once you have sent your BOLIS, it is necessary to press the button above so that the system converts the deposited BOLIS into Points and updates your account balance.
deposit.verify_info_timing: ⏱️ The process is completely automatic and can take from a few seconds to several minutes, depending on the current congestion level of the Solana network.
deposit.verify_info_support: If a long time passed and your balance was not updated, make a report using the link at the bottom of this page.

withdraw.rate: {0} points = 1 BOLIS (withdrawable when you reach the minimum)
withdraw.success_auto: Success! Your withdrawal has been processed automatically and will arrive in your wallet shortly.
